CustomField.description: Required lookup to the target GAU. A lookup filter restricts selection to active GAUs (with a workaround for Payment-level allocations). Allocation amounts roll up to this GAU's summary fields.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The fund or designation this money is allocated to. Only active General Accounting Units can be selected.
CustomField.label: General Accounting Unit

lookupFilter.errorMessage: Choose an active General Accounting Unit for this Allocation. You cannot modify an Allocation assigned to an inactive General Accounting Unit.
lookupFilter.infoMessage: You must select an active General Accounting Unit for this Allocation.
